title.description: Intelligent spatial decision support for big onion farmers. Predict your yield, understand the reasons, and get expert recommendations.

dashboard.fill_form: Fill out the form and click Predict Yield to see the AI analysis.
dashboard.make_prediction: Please make a prediction first to see personalized agricultural advice.

predict.title: Predict Onion Yield
predict.subtitle: Enter soil and weather conditions to predict yield
predict.waitingDescription: Fill in the form and click Predict Yield to get AI analysis
predict.successDescription: AI has successfully generated yield prediction

recommend.title: Actionable Advice
recommend.subtitle: Steps you can take to improve your yield based on AI analysis
recommend.noDescription: Please make a prediction first to see personalized agricultural advice.
recommend.whatIfText: Our simulations show your yield could increase from {current} MT/Ha to {improved} MT/Ha.
recommend.expertDesc: Need more specific advice? Connect with a local agriculture officer.
recommend.irrigationDesc: Increase water supply during dry periods to stabilize yield.
recommend.heatDesc: Use mulching or shade techniques to reduce heat stress.
recommend.phDesc: Balance soil pH using lime or sulfur for optimal growth.
recommend.nutrientDesc: Apply balanced NPK fertilizer for better bulb development.
recommend.pestDesc: Monitor and control pests during critical growth stages.

explain.title: Why This Prediction?
explain.subtitle: Understand what factors influenced your yield prediction
explain.noDescription: Please make a prediction first to see explanation.
